We need to determine the falling distance using d = k*t^2. Let me find k from the examples.
I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

t = 1.2s, d = 10.02m:
t^2 = 1.2 * 1.2:
1.2 * 0.2 = 0.24
1.2 * 1.0 = 1.20
0.24 + 1.20 = 1.44
k = 10.02 / 1.2^2 = 10.02 / 1.44 = 10.02 / 1.44
= 0 + 1 * 1002 / 144
= 1 + 1 * 858 / 144
= 2 + 1 * 714 / 144
= 3 + 1 * 570 / 144
= 4 + 1 * 426 / 144
= 5 + 1 * 282 / 144
= 6 + 1 * 138 / 144
= 6.0 + 0.1 * 1380 / 144
= 6.1 + 0.1 * 1236 / 144
= 6.2 + 0.1 * 1092 / 144
= 6.3 + 0.1 * 948 / 144
= 6.4 + 0.1 * 804 / 144
= 6.5 + 0.1 * 660 / 144
= 6.6 + 0.1 * 516 / 144
= 6.7 + 0.1 * 372 / 144
= 6.8 + 0.1 * 228 / 144
= 6.9 + 0.1 * 84 / 144
= 6.90 + 0.01 * 840 / 144
= 6.91 + 0.01 * 696 / 144
= 6.92 + 0.01 * 552 / 144
= 6.93 + 0.01 * 408 / 144
= 6.94 + 0.01 * 264 / 144
= 6.95 + 0.01 * 120 / 144
= 6.950 + 0.001 * 1200 / 144
= 6.951 + 0.001 * 1056 / 144
= 6.952 + 0.001 * 912 / 144
= 6.953 + 0.001 * 768 / 144
= 6.954 + 0.001 * 624 / 144
= 6.955 + 0.001 * 480 / 144
= 6.956 + 0.001 * 336 / 144
= 6.957 + 0.001 * 192 / 144
= 6.958 + 0.001 * 48 / 144
= 6.958

t = 4.13s, d = 118.7m:
t^2 = 4.13 * 4.13:
4.13 * 0.03 = 0.1239
4.13 * 0.10 = 0.4130
4.13 * 4.00 = 16.5200
0.1239 + 0.4130 = 0.5369
0.5369 + 16.5200 = 17.0569
k = 118.7 / 4.13^2 = 118.7 / 17.0569 = 118.700 / 17.056
= 0 + 1 * 118700 / 17056
= 1 + 1 * 101644 / 17056
= 2 + 1 * 84588 / 17056
= 3 + 1 * 67532 / 17056
= 4 + 1 * 50476 / 17056
= 5 + 1 * 33420 / 17056
= 6 + 1 * 16364 / 17056
= 6.0 + 0.1 * 163640 / 17056
= 6.1 + 0.1 * 146584 / 17056

= 6.3 + 0.1 * 112472 / 17056

= 6.6 + 0.1 * 61304 / 17056
= 6.7 + 0.1 * 44248 / 17056

= 6.950 + 0.001 * 160800 / 17056
= 6.951 + 0.001 * 143744 / 17056
= 6.952 + 0.001 * 126688 / 17056

t = 1.49s, d = 15.45m:
t^2 = 1.49 * 1.49:
1.49 * 0.09 = 0.1341
1.49 * 0.40 = 0.5960
1.49 * 1.00 = 1.4900
0.1341 + 0.5960 = 0.7301
0.7301 + 1.4900 = 2.2201
k = 15.45 / 1.49^2 = 15.45 / 2.2201 = 15.450 / 2.220
= 0 + 1 * 15450 / 2220
= 1 + 1 * 13230 / 2220
= 2 + 1 * 11010 / 2220
= 3 + 1 * 8790 / 2220
= 4 + 1 * 6570 / 2220
= 5 + 1 * 4350 / 2220
= 6 + 1 * 2130 / 2220
= 6.0 + 0.1 * 21300 / 2220
= 6.1 + 0.1 * 19080 / 2220
= 6.2 + 0.1 * 16860 / 2220
= 6.3 + 0.1 * 14640 / 2220
= 6.4 + 0.1 * 12420 / 2220
= 6.5 + 0.1 * 10200 / 2220
= 6.6 + 0.1 * 7980 / 2220
= 6.7 + 0.1 * 5760 / 2220
= 6.8 + 0.1 * 3540 / 2220
= 6.9 + 0.1 * 1320 / 2220
= 6.90 + 0.01 * 13200 / 2220
= 6.91 + 0.01 * 10980 / 2220
= 6.92 + 0.01 * 8760 / 2220

= 6.95 + 0.01 * 2100 / 2220
= 6.950 + 0.001 * 21000 / 2220
= 6.951 + 0.001 * 18780 / 2220

= 6.953 + 0.001 * 14340 / 2220
= 6.954 + 0.001 * 12120 / 2220
= 6.955 + 0.001 * 9900 / 2220
= 6.956 + 0.001 * 7680 / 2220
= 6.957 + 0.001 * 5460 / 2220
= 6.958 + 0.001 * 3240 / 2220
= 6.959 + 0.001 * 1020 / 2220
= 6.959

k values: 6.958, 6.959, 6.959
k values (sorted): 6.958, 6.959, 6.959
The median k is 6.959.

For t = 1.71:
t^2 = 1.71 * 1.71:
1.71 * 0.01 = 0.0171
1.71 * 0.70 = 1.1970
1.71 * 1.00 = 1.7100
0.0171 + 1.1970 = 1.2141
1.2141 + 1.7100 = 2.9241
= 2.9241

d = 6.959 * 2.9241:
6.959 * 0.0001 = 0.0006959
6.959 * 0.0040 = 0.0278360
6.959 * 0.0200 = 0.1391800
6.959 * 0.9000 = 6.2631000
6.959 * 2.0000 = 13.9180000
0.0006959 + 0.0278360 = 0.0285319
0.0285319 + 0.1391800 = 0.1677119
0.1677119 + 6.2631000 = 6.4308119
6.4308119 + 13.9180000 = 20.3488119
= 20.348

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{20.348}
